spec.definition:
with data as (select value::text as chwpId, equipment_id as chiller from control_params where "key" = 'chiller.chwpId'),
chwps as (select unnest(array['chwp1', 'chwp2', 'chwp3']) as id)
select *, upper(id) as name from chwps p left join data d on '"' || p.id || '"' = d.chwpId  
order by id
spec.name: chwp
